_comment: Sample FakeNewsNet-format cascade for digital twin testing. Real data available at: https://github.com/KaiDMML/FakeNewsNet
label: fake
article_text: A viral social media post claims the FBI reported that violent crime surged 47% in major cities last year, driven by what the post describes as a 'breakdown of law and order.' The post, shared over 200,000 times, cites unnamed 'internal FBI documents.' However, the FBI's official 2023 Crime in the United States report shows violent crime actually decreased by approximately 3% from the prior year. The claim about a 47% surge is not supported by any official statistics.
